title: polemonium carneum
intro: Polemonium carneum, also known as Rocky Mountain Jacob's ladder, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant contains anthraquinone glycosides, which possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polemonium carneum include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and possibly lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
